product_results.title: NEW'C 3 Pack Designed for iPhone 16 Pro,iPhone 17, 17 Pro Screen Protector (6.3 inches), Enhanced Tempered Glass Protection with easy installation tool included, Case Friendly

summary.text: Customers find these screen protectors to be of great quality and describe them as excellent. The installation process is very easy, and the protectors fit phones perfectly. Users report no bubbles at all during application, and any bubbles are easy to remove. The protectors provide good functionality, screen protection, and clarity. However, customers have mixed opinions about the durability of the product.

authors_reviews.title: Solid Protection Without Affecting Clarity
authors_reviews.text: It’s really good and tough glass. I love it. Excellent screen glass protector for mobile phones. Easy to install with no bubbles and perfect edge-to-edge fit. The tempered glass provides strong scratch resistance and reliable drop protection while maintaining clear display quality and smooth touch sensitivity. Fingerprint resistant coating works well and does not affect screen brightness. Great value for money and highly recommended for daily mobile screen protection.
authors_reviews.author: Meet Pandya

authors_reviews.title: Good product
authors_reviews.text: Excellent quality screen protector with a perfect fit for my iPhone. The installation was quick and easy thanks to the included alignment tool. The tempered glass feels durable and provides strong protection against scratches and daily wear. The screen remains crystal clear and touch sensitivity is not affected. Overall, a great value for a 3-pack and highly recommended. 👍
authors_reviews.author: yakin

authors_reviews.title: Sturdy and Easy-to-Apply Screen Protectors
authors_reviews.text: These screen protectors feel solid and well-made. Once applied, they fit perfectly on my phone and are fully case-friendly. The glass feels smooth to the touch and responsive, with no interference in daily use. They give a reassuring sense of protection without adding bulk, and I feel more confident knowing my screen is safeguarded against scratches and minor bumps.
authors_reviews.author: ALan

authors_reviews.title: Great quality
authors_reviews.text: Very easy to install and great quality. Hoping for great longevity as well.
authors_reviews.author: Kendyl Young

authors_reviews.title: Privacy Screen Protector! Amazing for your phone
authors_reviews.text: Great privacy screen protector! Easy to install, fits perfectly, and the privacy filter works really well from side angles. The screen stays clear when viewed straight on, and it doesn’t affect touch sensitivity at all. Feels durable and high quality definitely worth it.
authors_reviews.author: Viet Phu

authors_reviews.title: Excellent Protection, Easy Installation, and Truly Case‑Friendly
authors_reviews.text: I used this NEW’C screen protector on my iPhone 16 Pro, and the installation frame made it incredibly easy—perfect alignment with no bubbles at all. The glass feels smooth and clear, and it doesn’t affect touch sensitivity.I’ve already dropped my phone a couple of times at work while handling equipment in the supply chain area, and the protector absorbed the impact without any damage to the screen underneath. It also works well with different cases—no lifting at the edges.Overall OpinionA reliable, durable protector that installs effortlessly and keeps the screen safe. Great value for a 3‑pack.
authors_reviews.author: Emil Jukovski

authors_reviews.title: Great value
authors_reviews.text: I’m really impressed with this 3-pack. The standout feature is definitely the alignment tool; it made the installation foolproof and I managed to get it perfectly centered with zero bubbles on my first try.The glass feels smooth and high-quality, maintaining the original touch sensitivity and screen clarity. It’s also truly case-friendly, as my cover didn't lift the edges at all. While the installation frame is a bit of a tight squeeze on the corners, the end result is a seamless fit.Getting three protectors for this price is a steal compared to store prices. It’s reliable, clear, and offers great peace of mind. Highly recommended for anyone who wants professional results at home.
authors_reviews.author: Suffyan

authors_reviews.title: Great screen protector – easy to apply!
authors_reviews.text: Smooth install and solid protectionI needed a screen protector that wouldn’t be a headache to apply, and this one surprised me in a good way.From opening the package to placing it on my phone, everything felt simple and well thought out. With just one press, it settled perfectly—no bubbles, no dust trapped underneath.The glass feels strong but still slim, so my screen looks clear and responds just like before. I also love how it doesn’t hold fingerprints; a quick wipe and it’s clean again.Definitely a good buy.
authors_reviews.author: Mehwish
